dashboard.label: Gateway Logs
dashboard.description: Structured OpenClaw gateway-log investigation for local troubleshooting.

html.p: This page is now backed by the structured openclaw:gateway:json signal family. It is the primary local troubleshooting surface for subsystem errors, noisy components, and raw gateway-log evidence.

search.query: `openclaw_gateway_logs_base` | timechart span=15m count by level limit=8 useother=t
`openclaw_gateway_logs_base` | stats count values(level) as levels by subsystem | sort - count | head 20
`openclaw_gateway_errors` | table timestamp level subsystem run_id session_id status error_code request_id message | sort - timestamp | head 25
`openclaw_gateway_error_signatures` | stats count latest(timestamp) as latest_seen values(message) as messages by subsystem error_signature | sort - count | head 20
`openclaw_gateway_logs_base` | table timestamp level subsystem run_id session_id status request_id error_code message | sort - timestamp | head 30
